channel.title: Machine Learning Security on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Machine Learning Security on simeononsecurity

item.title: AI Cybersecurity and Governance Certifications Are Not Keeping Up with the Problem
item.category: "AI security" , "AI governance" , "AI certifications" , "NIST AI RMF" , "NIST AI 600-1" , "ISO 42001" , "IAPP AIGP" , "prompt injection" , "AI cybersecurity" , "LLM security" , "OWASP LLM Top 10" , "MITRE ATLAS" , "AI risk management" , "AI compliance" , "machine learning security" , "model supply chain" , "adversarial AI" , "AI agents" , "MCP security" , "AI red teaming" , "AI governance certifications" , "agentic AI" , "Google SAIF"
item.description: A professional opinion on the gap between AI governance certifications and actual AI security practice. We passed several of them and came away disappointed. The frameworks are early and governance-focused. The attack surface grew faster.

item.title: CompTIA SecAI+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the CY0-001 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA SecAI+ Course" , "CY0-001 Certification" , "AI Security" , "Machine Learning Security" , "LLM Security" , "AI Governance Risk Compliance" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Artificial Intelligence" , "Adversarial Machine Learning" , "Responsible AI"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA SecAI+ (CY0-001) study course covering basic AI concepts, securing AI systems, AI-assisted security, and AI governance, risk, and compliance for cybersecurity practitioners.

item.title: CompTIA SecAI+ (CY0-001) Practice Test - SimeonOnSecurity
item.description: Prepare for the CompTIA SecAI+ (CY0-001) exam with our comprehensive practice test. Test your knowledge of basic AI concepts, securing AI systems, AI-assisted security, and AI governance, risk, and compliance.
